name: components/badge
description: A small, inline status label used to highlight metadata, counts, or states. Offers four visual variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) with auto-sizing, SVG icon support, and focus-visible rings. Built on Kobalte Badge and themeable via the cva variant system.
useCases: Status indicators on tables or cards to show 'Active', 'Pending', or 'Archived' states
Notification counters on navigation icons, messages, or cart badges
Category tags on article cards or product listings for quick filtering cues
Destructive badges for critical alerts such as 'Overdue' or 'Failed' process states
